requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval (AKEP)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备型式核准（AKEP）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備型式核准（AKEP）

summary.en: All radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Albanian market requires a mandatory AKEP type approval certificate under Albania's Electronic Communications Law. CE Declaration of Conformity, CCC, or FCC authorisation alone are NOT accepted as substitutes for AKEP type approval. Albania is progressively aligning its radio equipment regulatory framework with the EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED) as part of its EU accession candidacy (opened 2022). EN/ETSI-based test reports are accepted by AKEP as the technical basis for applications, reducing duplicative testing costs for products that already hold EU CE marking. Albanian language labelling is required. Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised.
summary.zh: 在阿尔巴尼亚市场销售的所有无线电设备和电信终端设备，须依据阿尔巴尼亚《电子通信法》取得AKEP强制型式核准证书。CE符合性声明、CCC或FCC授权单独不能替代AKEP型式核准。阿尔巴尼亚作为欧盟入盟候选国（2022年开启），正逐步将无线电设备监管框架与欧盟无线电设备指令（RED）接轨。AKEP接受基于EN/ETSI的检测报告作为申请的技术依据，可降低已持有欧盟CE标志产品的重复测试成本。须提供阿尔巴尼亚语标注。中国SRRC核准不被认可。
summary.zht: 在阿爾巴尼亞市場銷售的所有無線電設備和電信終端設備，須依據阿爾巴尼亞《電子通訊法》取得AKEP強制型式核准證書。CE符合性聲明、CCC或FCC授權單獨不能替代AKEP型式核准。阿爾巴尼亞作為歐盟入盟候選國（2022年開啟），正逐步將無線電設備監管框架與歐盟無線電設備指令（RED）接軌。AKEP接受基於EN/ETSI的測試報告作為申請的技術依據，可降低已持有歐盟CE標誌產品的重複測試成本。須提供阿爾巴尼亞語標注。中國SRRC核准不被認可。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 9918/2008 on Electronic and Postal Communications (Albania), as amended
AKEP Decision on Type Approval of Radio Equipment and Telecom Terminal Equipment
EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi / BT wideband data — accepted as technical basis)
EN 301 893 V2.1.1 (5 GHz Wi-Fi — accepted as technical basis)
EN 300 440 V2.2.1 (short-range devices — accepted as technical basis)
EN 301 511 / EN 301 908 (cellular GSM / LTE — accepted as technical basis)
EU Radio Equipment Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — reference framework for alignment

summary.en: China requires SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all intentional radio transmitters and a separate MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) for telecom terminal equipment connected to public networks. Applicable GB standards include GB/T 9254.1-2021 and GB 17625.1-2022 for EMC. CCC applies to in-scope products under the RF / electrical safety catalogue.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有有意无线电发射设备取得工业和信息化部下属无线电管理局（SRRC）无线电型式核准，接入公共网络的电信终端设备须另行取得工业和信息化部进网许可证（NAL）。电磁兼容适用GB标准（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB 17625.1-2022）。目录内产品须取得CCC认证（涵盖射频/电气安全）。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有有意無線電發射設備取得工業和信息化部下屬無線電管理局（SRRC）無線電型式核准，接入公共網路的電信終端設備須另行取得工業和信息化部進網許可證（NAL）。電磁相容適用GB標準（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB 17625.1-2022）。目錄內產品須取得CCC認證（涵蓋射頻/電氣安全）。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电发射设备型号核准 (MIIT Order No. 14, 2019)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — 电信设备进网许可管理办法 (MIIT Order No. 2, 2017)
GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Information technology equipment — radio disturbance characteristics)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (GB 4943.1, GB 9254 scope)

gap.en: A new AKEP type approval certificate is required for Albania — SRRC approval, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC authorisation are not accepted as standalone substitutes. EN/ETSI test reports generated for CE marking can be reused in the AKEP application to avoid duplicative radio and EMC testing, but cannot substitute the AKEP certificate itself. The MIIT NAL scope (public network access) does not map to AKEP's equipment type approval framework. Albanian language labelling is an additional mandatory requirement with no Chinese-side equivalent.
gap.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚要求重新取得AKEP型式核准证书，SRRC核准、CCC、CE符合性声明及FCC授权均不被单独接受为替代。为CE标志而生成的EN/ETSI检测报告可在AKEP申请中复用，以避免重复的无线电和电磁兼容测试，但不能替代AKEP证书本身。MIIT进网许可证范围（公共网络接入）与AKEP设备型式核准框架不对应。阿尔巴尼亚语标注是中国方面无对应项的额外强制要求。
gap.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞要求重新取得AKEP型式核准證書，SRRC核准、CCC、CE符合性聲明及FCC授權均不被單獨接受為替代。為CE標誌而生成的EN/ETSI測試報告可在AKEP申請中複用，以避免重複的無線電和電磁相容測試，但不能替代AKEP證書本身。MIIT進網許可證範圍（公共網路接入）與AKEP設備型式核准框架不對應。阿爾巴尼亞語標注是中國方面無對應項的額外強制要求。

source.publisher: AKEP — Autoriteti i Komunikimeve Elektronike dhe Postare (Electronic and Postal Communications Authority, Albania)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A separate AKEP type approval certificate is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Albanian market. CE DoC, CCC, and FCC authorisation alone are not sufficient. EN/ETSI test data generated for EU/CE purposes may be reused in the AKEP application but does not substitute for the AKEP certificate. SRRC approval is not recognised. Verify current AKEP requirements directly with AKEP or through a qualified local representative.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿尔巴尼亚市场销售的所有无线电和电信终端设备，强制要求另行取得AKEP型式核准证书。CE符合性声明、CCC及FCC授权单独均不满足要求。为欧盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI测试数据可在AKEP申请中复用，但不能替代AKEP证书。SRRC核准不被认可。请直接向AKEP或合格本地代表核实现行AKEP要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在阿爾巴尼亞市場銷售的所有無線電和電信終端設備，強制要求另行取得AKEP型式核准證書。CE符合性聲明、CCC及FCC授權單獨均不滿足要求。為歐盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI測試數據可在AKEP申請中複用，但不能替代AKEP證書。SRRC核准不被認可。請直接向AKEP或合格本地代表核實現行AKEP要求。
